description: Full Integration Testing: Run the pipeline with ALL governance flags enabled simultaneously (use_anomaly_leverage, use_theory_leverage, use_productive_forgetting, use_identity_governance, use_paradigm_fork) across v3b_curriculum, v6, and v7 task sets. Compare all-flags vs concept-only vs combined conditions. Measure cumulative benefit, interaction effects, and cost.
steps: Create virtual_genesis/eval/runners/run_full_integration.py following the pattern of run_broader_domain_eval.py but with an extended run_condition function that passes all governance flags to run_minimal_pipeline. Define new conditions: 'all_flags_enabled' (all 5 flags True with identity object), 'concept_only' (use_concepts=True, no governance flags), 'combined_baseline' (use_concepts=True, use_economy=True, no governance flags). Run against v3b_curriculum (primary), v6 cases, and v7 broader domain cases. Use AgentIdentityObject for identity governance. Compute interaction effects (benefit of all flags minus sum of individual benefits).

Create virtual_genesis/eval/reports/integration_summary.py with generate_integration_summary_report(all_flags_results, concept_only_results, combined_results) that computes: governance_overhead (extra cost from multiple mechanisms), cumulative_benefit (success_rate delta from baseline), interaction_effects (synergy/conflict between mechanisms), per-mechanism contribution estimates.

Create tests/test_full_integration.py with class TestFullIntegration: test_pipeline_all_flags_no_error (run pipeline with all flags True, confirm no exceptions), test_flags_dont_interfere (run pipeline with all flags, confirm all result keys present and correct types), test_all_flags_ge_concept_only (run small task set, confirm all-flags success_rate >= concept-only baseline), test_integration_runner_returns_valid_payload (call run_full_integration on small set, check payload structure). Use simple string tasks for quick tests.
Add __init__.py exports if needed for new modules. Ensure all imports work correctly.
acceptance_criteria: run_full_integration.py runs without errors on at least a minimal task set
integration_summary.py generates a report with governance_overhead, cumulative_benefit, and interaction_effects keys
tests/test_full_integration.py has at least 4 tests that all pass
All 285+ existing tests continue to pass
Pipeline with all 5 flags True produces valid result dict with all expected keys
findings: All 289 tests pass (285 existing + 4 new). Pipeline with all 5 governance flags runs cleanly. No import or compatibility issues.
